messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: On it. inventory.stock_count reaching -47 for high-demand SKU. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Root cause: Stock decrement used read-then-write pattern without atomic operation: read stoc.... Rolling back.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
